stories.title: Configure electron-updater dependency
stories.description: Install and configure electron-updater package with proper Electron Forge integration for auto-update support.

steps.description: Install electron-updater as a dependency
Configure Electron Forge publisher for GitHub releases
Add update-related scripts to package.json

stories.title: Implement main process update manager
stories.description: Create the main process module that checks for updates, downloads them, and manages the update lifecycle with proper error handling.

steps.description: Create updater.ts module with autoUpdater configuration
Add update check on app ready event
Implement download progress tracking
Handle update-downloaded event with install prompt

stories.title: Build IPC bridge for update status
stories.description: Create IPC channels between main and renderer processes to communicate update status, progress, and user actions.

steps.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for update events
Expose update API through preload contextBridge
Create IPC handler registration in main process
Add type-safe IPC channel constants

stories.title: Create update notification UI component
stories.description: Build a React component that shows update availability, download progress, and restart prompt to the user.

steps.description: Create UpdateBanner component with update states
Add progress bar for download visualization
Implement restart button with confirmation
Style banner with CSS animations for state transitions

stories.title: Add update preferences and skip version logic
stories.description: Allow users to skip specific versions and configure update check frequency through a preferences store.

steps.description: Create electron-store based preferences module
Add skip-version tracking logic
Build UpdateSettings component for preferences UI
Wire preferences into updater check logic

stories.title: Implement rollback and error recovery
stories.description: Handle failed updates gracefully with rollback capability and user-friendly error messages.

steps.description: Add error event handlers to updater module
Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
Create UpdateError component with retry/dismiss actions
Log update failures for diagnostics
